parameters.command:
# Get storage information
echo 'Getting storage information...'

# Get total and available storage in bytes
storage_info=$(df /sdcard | tail -1)
total_kb=$(echo $storage_info | awk '{print $2}')
available_kb=$(echo $storage_info | awk '{print $4}')
used_kb=$(echo $storage_info | awk '{print $3}')

# Convert to MB for easier handling
total_mb=$((total_kb / 1024))
available_mb=$((available_kb / 1024))
used_mb=$((used_kb / 1024))

# Calculate percentage used
used_percent=$((used_mb * 100 / total_mb))
available_percent=$((100 - used_percent))

echo "total_mb:$total_mb"
echo "available_mb:$available_mb"
echo "used_mb:$used_mb"
echo "used_percent:$used_percent"
echo "available_percent:$available_percent"

parameters.text:
{{ $('Process Storage Data').item.json.alert_message }}

📊 **Storage Report:**
• **Total:** {{ $('Process Storage Data').item.json.formatted_total }}
• **Available:** {{ $('Process Storage Data').item.json.formatted_available }} ({{ $('Process Storage Data').item.json.available_percent }}%)
• **Used:** {{ $('Process Storage Data').item.json.formatted_used }} ({{ $('Process Storage Data').item.json.used_percent }}%)

💡 **Recommended Actions:**
{% if $('Process Storage Data').item.json.alert_level == 'critical' %}• Delete unnecessary files immediately
• Move photos to cloud storage
• Clear app caches
• Remove old downloads{% elif $('Process Storage Data').item.json.alert_level == 'high' %}• Review and delete old files
• Upload photos to cloud
• Clear caches{% else %}• Consider cleanup soon
• Regular maintenance{% endif %}

🕐 **Time:** {{ new Date().toLocaleString() }}
